captureHistory.note: 56 reviews captured from user-supplied screenshots and full-review images.
20 reviews captured via Claude in Chrome browser scrape.
13 review photos relocated from reviewer-profiles/ to reviews/ (PR #review-photos-reclassify-plan).
+1 review (Erin Ponchak, LG dryer no-heat, Huntington Beach) added directly from owner-supplied verbatim text. GBP total bumped 76 to 78 (owner-confirmed re-scrape).
+1 no-body record (Drew McMillan, 5-star rating, no body, no photo, no service tag) added; gap between capturedCount and totalReviewsOnListing now closed at 78.

+2 reviews (mike bonilla, no appliance tag; Ken Turknette, wine cooler repair) captured live from GBP reviews dialog via Chrome MCP, sorted Newest. GBP total bumped 78 to 80 (owner-confirmed via 80-review count on knowledge panel).

+2 reviews (Surma Karimova, GE oven, with photo; A T, Viking wine cooler compressor replacement in Costa Mesa, with exterior photo) added from owner-supplied screenshot and downloaded review photos. Two technician job photos (brazing + compressor) saved to images/real/business/ for use on recent-repairs, Costa Mesa city page, and wine cooler hub. GBP total bumped 80 to 82.

GBP total bumped 82 to 83 (owner-confirmed via GBP screenshot showing 83 reviews). The item shown as newest on GBP is Roger Antonie's pre-existing review (originally approxDate 2026-03), edited to append 'Thank you'; his existing record body was updated accordingly (no new card added). The actual 83rd, genuinely-new review was not visible in the supplied screenshot and has not yet been captured.

+1 review (Pawan Deepak, range-hood light-fixture repair by tech Ag, with photo) captured from owner-supplied GBP screenshot. GBP listing total bumped 83 to 84. Review photo saved to images/real/reviews/hood-pawan-deepak.webp (downscaled from 3393x1495/602KB to 1200x529/35KB to match the gallery). Reconciliation: the array held 82 genuine google records while capturedCount read 83 (a phantom slot from the 2026-05-31 optimistic bump, where no new card was actually added). This Pawan Deepak card fills that slot, so capturedCount stays 83 and is now accurate; the 84-vs-83 gap is the still-uncaptured review the 2026-05-31 note flagged. Next GBP scrape should verify the two newest cards to confirm no older review is still missing.

Owner-approved site-wide AggregateRating bump to 84 (Task 4 of tasks/add-review-pawan-deepak-2026-06-08.md). Schema reviewCount and visible review-count copy ('From our 84 verified 5-star Google reviews', 'Read all 84 reviews') updated 83 to 84 across 35 pages to mirror the public GBP listing total. The content-integrity 'review-count' check was repointed from capturedCount to totalReviewsOnListing (84) so capturedCount stays an honest internal transcription count (83 = 83 google records in the array). ratingValue unchanged at 5.0; GBP shows 5.0 across all 84.

policyNotes: Location policy is source-specific. Google records: city not exposed by Google, all standardized to 'Orange County, CA'. Yelp records: use the city displayed on the reviewer's Yelp profile (real OC cities like Dana Point, Anaheim, Irvine).

Rating filter is enforced by display rule, not by capture. All Google records (83) are 5-star; Yelp has 3 × 5-star + 1 × 1-star captured. The 1-star reviewer (Tony B.) is from San Bernardino, CA — outside the OC service area, which likely explains the 'didn't show up' complaint (logistics, not service quality). The 1-star record is captured for accurate rating math but never displayed as a testimonial (see testimonial-selection.md step 1).
Bodies preserved verbatim including spelling/grammar issues. Use _bodyHasTypos flag to decide if light correction is acceptable for display.
All review bodies that have text are now complete (Kathy Calderon, Dave Brisbin, andrea hall full bodies sourced from missing_data/ folder).
Two reviews have no body text (Theresa Robinson is photo-only with stove image; Luci LaBue has only 'Reasonable price' + 'Washing machine repair' service tags). Useful for photo display only.

Review photos (.webp) for 13 reviewers stored at images/real/reviews/, named [appliance]-[brand-if-confirmed]-[reviewer].webp. Each is referenced via its reviewPhoto field. The profilePhoto field is currently null for every record — no actual reviewer avatars have been captured.

Review photos: 7 captured as Google CDN URLs from initial browser scrape (may need re-download to local before they expire); 13 previously embedded in screenshots have been extracted and saved locally at images/real/reviews/ (2026-05-12).

Display rule for testimonials (mirrors .claude/rules/testimonial-selection.md step 6): a record is quotable as a testimonial only if it satisfies one of (a) has a reviewPhoto and body ≥3 words; (b) no reviewPhoto and body ≥8 words; (c) no reviewPhoto and body <8 words but the body names a specific appliance (refrigerator/fridge/washer/washing machine/dryer/dishwasher/oven/stove/range/cooktop/microwave/freezer/garbage disposal/wine cooler) or brand (Whirlpool/GE/Samsung/LG/Sub-Zero/Wolf/Bosch/Viking/KitchenAid/Maytag/Frigidaire/Kenmore/Thermador/Miele/Dacor). Records with bodyStatus 'photo-only' or 'no-body' are never quotable; their photos may be used as imagery. Row-balance and ≤2-overlap rules in the same rules file also apply.

Schema: every record has a 'source' field ('google' | 'yelp'). Yelp records may have a 'previousBody' field for updated reviews. Records linked across sources have a '_crossSourceMatch' field pointing to the corresponding record's id.

AggregateRating in HTML schema markup is Google-only (5.0 × 84). reviewCount mirrors the public GBP listing total (_meta.sources.google.totalReviewsOnListing = 84), NOT capturedCount (83 transcribed records). The content-integrity 'review-count' check validates pages against totalReviewsOnListing. The two diverge by 1 because the listing's newest review is on GBP but not yet transcribed into this pool (see captureHistory 2026-06-08). Yelp is not folded into AggregateRating due to small sample size, 4.0 average, and Google's discouragement of mixed-source aggregates. Yelp may be surfaced as a separate visual trust signal.

reviews.name: Pawan Deepak
reviews.body: Agee was very professional and did a great job repairing the light fixture of the hood.
reviews._note: Source: owner-supplied GBP screenshot 2026-06-08. Range-hood light-fixture repair by tech Ag ('Agee'). Photo shows a stainless-steel range-hood underside (downscaled to 1200px-wide webp to match the review gallery). Location standardized to 'Orange County, CA' per Google source policy (city not exposed). bodyHasTypos=false ('Agee' is the customer's spelling of the technician's name, preserved verbatim). This card fills the phantom capturedCount slot from the 2026-05-31 optimistic bump; GBP listing total moved to 84 (see _meta reconciliation note).

Trailing '+++++' preserved verbatim; light trim recommended for display.

reviews.name: Jennifer Trette
reviews.body: The dryer repairman was quick, efficient, and very knowledgeable. He clearly explained the issue and the fix, kept me informed throughout the process, and was friendly and professional the entire time. Great service from start to finish!

reviews.name: Erin Ponchak
reviews.body: Ag was extremely professional and very efficient. He diagnosed the problem and fixed it on the spot. I highly recommend him!

reviews.name: Lale
reviews.body: AG fixed my old GE Monogram refrigerator. Very friendly, fast and good service. Recommend

reviews.name: Marcy Kucik
reviews.body: Absolutely excellent! AG fixed my refrigerator in a timely and professional manner with great customer service. He is now my go-to for appliance repair. I highly recommend AG as your tech.

reviews.name: Cindy Montefu
reviews.body: AG has been fantastic while fixing our dryer! His work is thorough and his customer service is A+++! He will definitely be my 1st call when we need another repair! Thanks again AG!
reviews._note: Has 3 photos on Google (dryer) — not yet captured.

reviews.name: Robert Clemmons
reviews.body: They saved Christmas entertaining by coming before Christmas (though it took a couple trips)! Thank you for a job well done!

reviews.name: Wendy Henderson
reviews.body: Technician was on time and polite. Could have charged me a bunch of money for unnecessary repairs but he was honest and didn't do that. I will definitely call again when another appliance needs attention.

reviews.name: Danette Vanover
reviews.body: Have used Appliance Repair on the past. AG is a 5 star technician. On time, polite. Offered a detailed description of the problem. For a 12 year old washer the repair cost would far exceed in comparison to today's market value of a new washer. Appreciated the up front honesty. At no charged he did a minor adjustment to prevent stagnant water accumulating in the soap dispenser thus eliminating the foul order emitting in my washer. Have no problem calling AG in the future. It's reassuring to find a service with integrity that is honest up front. Thank you. D. Vanover
reviews._note: Source: danette_vanover_full_review.png. Reviewer typos preserved verbatim ('on the past' → in the past; 'no charged' → no charge; 'foul order' → foul odor). Light editing recommended for display.

reviews.name: Russell Kadota
reviews.body: A.G. arrived with the part my washing machine needed and replaced it very quickly. He was very courteous and professional.

reviews.name: Tony Tomassini
reviews.body: Our technician was top rate in terms of product knowledge so the repairs on our dishwasher and wash machine were handled efficiently and on budget. Great customer service as well — I highly recommend this company.

reviews.body: AG did a great job detecting and repairing my washing machine leak. He was prompt and courteous. Will use him and his company in the future.

reviews.body: AG did a great job repairing my dishwasher. He was prompt, quick and fair. I will use him again for any future repair needs.

reviews.name: Katie Anne Salen
reviews.body: We've received fast and high quality service on our dryer each time we've needed it. The repairman is courteous and clear — we will call him again when another appliance needs repair.

reviews.name: John Dinger
reviews.body: AG was polite, on time, fairly priced and very knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Steve D
reviews.body: My cooktop burners kept clicking and sparking. We didn't feel that it was safe to use. Called AG and he quickly diagnosed the problem as a bad spark module, came out the same day, ordered the part and fixed it the next day, as soon as the part came in. He was fast, efficient, with fair pricing. He was a great communicator and kept me in the loop the whole time. Highly recommended and will use again. Thanks, AJ!
reviews._note: Source: steve_d_full_review.png. Reviewer is a Local Guide with 95 reviews and 29 photos available — owner export recommended for the photo set; would be valuable for hub pages.

reviews.name: Julie L.
reviews.body: Great experience! Our dryer was making a horrible squeaking noise. I contacted Universal Appliance, Gason called me back and was here within 30 minutes. He repaired our dryer in a timely manner and was kind and respectful. Thank you for your help.

Professional, courteous, and reliable—couldn't ask for better service!

reviews.body: I had a great experience with this appliance repair service. I wouldn't hesitate to call him again or recommend him to others.

reviews.name: William L.
reviews.body: We had a cooktop installed, and the wiring was a little short on the model we bought and the workmen had to get additional wiring to complete the job and did a wonderful job installing the cooktop. His price was so considerate I gave him a tip.
reviews.previousBody: Old cooktop needed to be replaced. The old cooktop was 36 inch and the new one was also advertised as 36 inch but was actually 34 inches. The serviceman pulled out the old one out only to find the new one was too small and replaced the old one back in the hole. He helped me order the correct cooktop and will come back to reinstall it. Great service and a great value highly recommended.
reviews._note: Yelp updated review (previous Aug 17, 2024). No photo attached to this review on Yelp (reviewer's profile photo count is lifetime, not per-review). Note: this is a cooktop installation/replacement, not a repair — still credible trust signal.

reviews.name: mrs d.
reviews.body: AG did a great job moving my gas range from one house to another house. He also uninstalled a dishwasher for me. Various contractors lately have damaged my house which created more work for me, thus, I am extremely pleased that AG and his helpers were very careful. I appreciate that he was punctual and did the work in the time he said it would take.
reviews._note: Service type is appliance moving + uninstall, not repair. Display preferred on city pages (Irvine) over service hubs. No photo attached to this review on Yelp (the 8 photos shown on reviewer's profile are lifetime across all her Yelp reviews, not attached to this one).

reviews.name: Tony B.
reviews.body: Had scheduled an appointment for 3pm-4pm today. Never showed up and tried to reach out to them multiple times.
reviews._note: 1-star review. Reviewer's displayed location is San Bernardino, CA — outside the business's Orange County service area, which likely explains the no-show (logistics/range mismatch, not a service quality issue). Captured for accurate rating math; never displayed as testimonial (filtered by 5-star precondition in testimonial-selection.md step 1).
